since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +5.62%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.70% · BTC -3.07% · Gold +0.46% · Nasdaq100 +1.59%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +5.62%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +5.62%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +26.80%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +26.80%, AVAV +18.88%, CEVA +8.83%, KLAC +8.69%, SYM +7.68%. Laggards: DLR -4.74%, TTD -3.97%, PINS -3.86%, HON -3.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.51% at $169.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
